summary: Backend testing for report generation pass-by-pass progress feature. All 7 core tests passed. Verified: (1) GET /status returns progress object when status='generating' with correct fields (current_pass, total_passes, pass_label, pass_title), (2) GET /status does NOT return progress when status='completed', (3) generation_progress is NOT leaked on full report fetch after completion, (4) PASS_TITLES dict has correct entries for full_detailed (8 passes) and extensive_log (10 passes), (5) Regression tests passed for /reports list, health endpoint, and 404 handling.
critical_code_review_comments: Implementation is correct: _update_report_pass_progress helper is called at the start of each pass loop iteration in both full_detailed (line 1314) and extensive_log (line 1618)
PASS_TITLES dict correctly maps all 8 passes for full_detailed and all 10 passes for extensive_log
$unset for generation_progress is correctly applied on all 3 completion/failure write points in reports.py (lines 103, 146, 172, 179)
/status endpoint correctly returns progress sub-object only when status='generating' AND generation_progress exists

success_rate.backend: 100% (7/7 tests passed, 4 skipped due to rate limiting)

seed_data_creation: Seeded test report with status='generating' and generation_progress to verify /status endpoint returns progress object correctly
context_for_next_testing_agent: Report generation progress feature fully tested and working. GET /status returns progress object (current_pass, total_passes, pass_label, pass_title) when status='generating'. Progress is NOT returned for completed reports. generation_progress is properly unset on completion/failure.

status_endpoint_completed_no_progress.note: progress field is NOT present for completed reports

full_report_no_generation_progress_leak.note: generation_progress is NOT present in response keys after completion
